title: Josh Wood (rugby league)
extract:
Josh Wood (born 15 November 1995) is an English professional rugby league footballer who plays as a hooker for the Barrow Raiders in the RFL Championship.
He previously played for the Salford Red Devils in the Super League, and spent time on loan from Salford at the North Wales Crusaders in League 1, and Halifax and the Swinton Lions in the Championship. He played as a scrum-half and stand-off earlier in his career.
